titleStmt.title: SII 22.470: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 470.

summary.p: Records contributions made by merchants at fixed rates on articles of merchandise for the benefit of the temple of Kōdaṇḍaraghunāthasvāmi at Duvvūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1531 Agunē
ṭi saumya saṁvvatsara kā¨rtika śu 5 lu śrī madakhi
lāṁḍa kōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyakulayina
duvvūri sthaḷamaṁdu baṁgāru cenabayyanagāru
vēyiṁccina vanamulō prasaṁnamayina kōdaṁḍa
raghunātha svāmula divya śrīpādapadmaṁbulaku svasti
samasta nijanāmāṁka māḷikā praśasta sahitu
layina Ayyāvaḷi mukhyamayina pū¨rva paści
ma vutara dakṣiṇāla nalayāṁbhayiyā
ru dēśālavāru daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci yicci
na magama dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ duvūru caṁnūru sidhavaṭa
ṁ badē vōli sīmalanu sahōrādulavacci poyyēṭi
duṁdi Āsulaku koṭlaṁ 1ki paurika lekhanu vuppu gōne
ku vīsamuṁnnu javiḷa koṭlānaku Aḍḍugānu poṁka bella
ṁ miriyālu modalayina rasava¨rgānaku gōneku vīsā
nu kāyadhānyānaku biyamunaku gōnaku parakānu
joṁnalaku vuluvalanuku vīsamu kogaru gaṁ
kalaka nu ṁ ku paurikānu Aṁgaḍi
ki yēṁḍlu 1 ki rūkānu mannānaku yēṁḍlu 1 ki rūkā
nu peṁḍliki rūkānu gānine(ge)ku yēṁḍlu 1 ki rūkā
nu yī maryādanu yiccina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . yī ma
ryādanu yevvaru yiyyakuṁnagāni . yiṁduku
yiccavvaru A¨rcceḍa na sēsinagāni . yī soṁmu ya
vvaru Ā sācinagāni tammanumucalu vāḍiki
yiccinavāru tamatalli taṁḍrula kāśilō vadhiṁcina
pāpāna pōvuvāru .
Digital edition of SII 22.470 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
